name: Turkey Cutlets Milanaise
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces (16 slices) turkey breast or other firm white bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Process bread cubes in a food processor until fine, about 30 seconds.
2. Spread crumbs on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 7 minutes or until lightly browned.
3. Combine 1 cup bread crumbs with Parmesan cheese in a shallow bowl; set aside.
4. In another shallow bowl, combine egg and egg white. Set aside.
5. Pound each turkey cutlet to 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Sprinkle both sides of the cutlets with flour.
7. Dip cutlets first in egg mixture, then dredge in breadcrumb mixture.
8. Place cutlets on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray and bake at 450°F for 8 minutes.
9. Sprinkle chopped parsley over the cutlets and serve with lemon slices.
(Fat: 6.1; Cholesterol: 131.)
